feeds.notes: Catches candidacy declarations and forum/debate announcements.

feeds.name: Block Club Chicago

feeds.notes: Monitored by website-diff. Frequent candidate-forum coverage and video.

feeds.name: Chicago Reader — Politics
feeds.notes: Home of the Ben Joravsky Show; monitor for episode posts and columns.

feeds.name: The Ben Joravsky Show
feeds.notes: RSS hand-verified 2026-07-09 (live, mp3 enclosures). Chicago-politics interview show. enabled:false until one on-demand run confirms the enclosure->audio->extract path; each episode is a full transcription (Groq cost).

feeds.name: The Fran Spielman Show
feeds.notes: RSS hand-verified 2026-07-09 (live, mp3 enclosures; PRX/dovetail 12963). Sun-Times weekly City Hall interview show — strong candidate coverage. enabled:false until an on-demand verification run.

feeds.name: City Cast Chicago
feeds.notes: RSS hand-verified 2026-07-09 (live, mp3 enclosures). Daily Chicago local-news/politics show. enabled:false until an on-demand verification run; higher episode volume than the interview shows.
